input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.4.1
            TITLE: maximum test speed

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.4.1: Maximum Test Speed
IN.10.4.1 Maximum Test Speed 
The engine speed that corresponds to an average piston speed of: 
a. Automotive / Motorcycle engines  914.4 m/min (3,000 ft/min) 
b. Industrial Engines    731.5 m/min (2,400 ft/min) 
The calculated speed will be rounded to the nearest 500 rpm.  
Test Speeds for typical engines are published on the FSAE Online website

final_answer: rule IN.10.4.1: Maximum Test Speed IN.10.4.1 Maximum Test Speed The engine speed that corresponds to an average piston speed of: a. Automotive / Motorcycle engines 914.4 m/min (3,000 ft/min) b. Industrial Engines 731.5 m/min (2,400 ft/min) The calculated speed will be rounded to the nearest 500 rpm. Test Speeds for typical engines are published on the FSAE Online website
